faq.question: Is this just another list of prompts I can find online for free?
faq.answer: No. Free lists provide context-free, one-shot prompts that quickly become outdated. We provide a durable, repeatable framework (C.R.A.F.T.) that teaches you how to create your own superior prompts for any situation. The guide includes examples, but the core value is the system itself

faq.question: Which AI tools does this system work with?
faq.answer: The C.R.A.F.T. Framework is tool-agnostic. It's a methodology for communicating with any advanced language model, including those from OpenAI (ChatGPT), Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini), and others. The principles you learn will make you a better user of any AI platform

faq.question: I'm not a marketer. Is this still useful for me?
faq.answer: Absolutely. If you're a founder, consultant, or sales leader who needs to generate strategic documents, emails, analyses, or presentations, this system will help you do it more effectively. The focus is on creating high-value business outputs, regardless of your specific role

faq.question: How quickly can I see results?
faq.answer: You can see a noticeable improvement in your AI outputs within 10 minutes by applying the 'Quick Win' prompts in Chapter 1. Mastering the full C.R.A.F.T. framework is designed to be achievable in a weekend, providing you with a long-term strategic skill

Move beyond generic AI content and learn to craft prompts that generate high-quality, brand-aligned, and truly strategic outputs for all your marketing and sales needs. Discover how to build a distinct AI brand voice and optimize your...

schemaFaq.question: Why does my AI content sound generic and robotic?
schemaFaq.answer: Generic AI content often stems from generic prompts. Without a structured methodology, AI tools produce bland, uninspired outputs that fail to reflect your unique brand voice or strategic goals. The Anti-Generic Prompting System addresses this by teaching you how to craft targeted prompts that yield strategic, high-quality results.

schemaFaq.question: How can I get strategic, high-quality outputs from my AI tools?
schemaFaq.answer: Achieving strategic AI outputs requires a systematic approach. The Anti-Generic Prompting System introduces the C.R.A.F.T. Framework, a repeatable methodology that guides you in embedding your brand voice, business objectives, and specific context into your prompts, leading to superior, non-generic results for any business challenge.

schemaFaq.question: Is 'The Anti-Generic Prompting System' just another list of AI prompts?
schemaFaq.answer: No, this system goes far beyond simple prompt lists. The Anti-Generic Prompting System teaches you a fundamental skill and a repeatable framework (C.R.A.F.T.) for *how* to think about and craft prompts. This empowers you to generate strategic, non-generic outputs for any business challenge, rather than relying on pre-defined, one-size-fits-all prompts.
